text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out shopping...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you. Come with me if you've<n>got nothing
better to do. I'll give you<n>whatever data set you
want in return.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There're some goods I want from<n>that store.
Limited-edition shoes, to be<n>precise. The studded
U-MAX226.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It makes no sense to me that<n>shop-exclusive
products still exist in<n>this day and age, but
them's the<n>breaks for me, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's a reward in it if you line up<n>for me. You
in?
choice_data_list: Why don't you line up yourself?
Why don't you line up yourself?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's no logic in standing around in<n>a line. I got
mad as hell earlier when I<n>tried to do it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Dammit, why don't they just sell<n>them online to
begin with? Then I<n>wouldn't have to waste time
doing<n>this.
choice_data_list: Why don't you get them in a way that suits you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, if we're talking about a method<n>that suits
me, I had one from the start,<n>but I decided to nix it
right away.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Then again, I already got approval<n>from the
academy, so it'd be rude if I<n>didn't go ahead
with it, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Guess it's time to stop holding backand do things my way!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Whatever Air Shakur's suggestingsounds kind of unsavory, but maybe Icould learn a thing or two fromher way of doing things.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, can't say I didn't expect that<n>line of logic to
pop up. You believe in<n>hard work? I don't.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But I can tell that you don't wanna do<n>it, even
though the opportunity to get<n>data from me is so
rare.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch, fine. I'll use the time to gather<n>intel on other
stores while I'm in line.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She ends up queuing up herself,<n>tutting and
grumbling the whole time it<n>takes to reach the
store. I hope the<n>U-MAX226 shoes were worth
it...
